criteria_results.description: Minimize toolbox for mobile (remove drawing tools, etc.)
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx, ToolSelector and ObjectPropertyEditor are hidden when isMobile is true (lines 29-40).

criteria_results.description: Mobile toolbar must show only: Save Project, Export to ZIP, and Export to PDF
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/components/editor/Toolbar/ProjectActions.tsx (lines 48-82), the mobile view returns a div with exactly three buttons: Save Project (handleSave), Export PDF (handleFlattenAndDownload), and Export ZIP (handleExportProject).

criteria_results.description: Auto-save project after each photo upload
criteria_results.evidence: handleSave(true) is called after ADD_OBJECT_PHOTO dispatch in client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx (line 75) and client/src/components/editor/ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx (line 103).

criteria_results.description: PM role on mobile can change object status via direct buttons
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx (lines 173-214) renders a scrollable list of status buttons for PMs, which trigger UPDATE_OBJECTS and handleSave(true).

criteria_results.description: Enlarged mobile quick-access bar with status buttons
criteria_results.evidence: In MobileBottomBar.tsx, the bar height is h-20 (line 113) and the status buttons are h-12 (line 184), significantly larger than standard controls for better touch targets.

criteria_results.description: Display photo count in buttons and gallery header

blocking_issues: The early return 'if (isTech) return ...' in client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx (line 99) completely blocks technicians from taking photos or seeing object info on mobile. This is a regression for the 'documentation' goal, as TECHs are typically the ones performing documentation in the field (as noted in ARCHITECTURAL_EVOLUTION.md). The Photo button and Object info should be accessible to TECHs as well.
suggestions: Consider adding auto-save (handleSave(true)) to note and label changes in PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx (with debouncing) to ensure all documentation is preserved.
The Export ZIP and Export PDF buttons on mobile (ProjectActions.tsx) use icons without labels; while consistent with 'minimization', adding brief aria-labels or tooltips would improve accessibility.
next_focus: Remove the restrictive 'if (isTech)' early return in MobileBottomBar.tsx so that Technicians can still take photos and see object identification on mobile, while keeping the status buttons specifically for the PM role as requested.
